strategy: Build with blades, not single traps - any single trap or prism on him gets Cleanse Warded away. If you want wards on him, use mass traps or mass prisms; those do not trigger the cheat.
Hit with Fire (+35%) or Myth (+25%). He resists Ice 80% and Storm 40% - Ice and Storm wizards need prisms, applied as mass versions or on the hit round.
Avoid mid-size chip hits: around 2,000 damage he can answer with +40% Ice Traps on your whole team plus a 400-500 Blizzard. One big finishing hit skips that response entirely.
He is stunable - a stun on your setup or hit round keeps him quiet. Clear the two Wildclaws with an AoE finish.
cheatNotes: Hitting him for around 2,000 damage can trigger +40% Ice Traps on your whole team plus a 400-500 Blizzard (exact conditions unverified). Prefer one big finish over repeated medium hits, and keep health topped.
Any single trap or prism you put on him gets removed with Cleanse Ward, so a standard Feint setup is wasted.
Mass traps and mass prisms slip through - use those versions if you want wards on him.
Vaporize (Ice dispel) can block the Cleanse Ward response, letting a trap stick.
